modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into SSH Secure Shell Client due to error.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to log into the SSH Secure Shell but it is not working. The error message says "Algorithm negotiation failed." I think this might be because the remote host does not support the algorithms that are selected.
short_description: Unable to log into SSH Secure Shell Client due to error.
description: I am trying to log into the SSH Secure Shell but it is not working. The error message says "Algorithm negotiation failed." I think this might be because the remote host does not support the algorithms that are selected.
